news.title: Metro Atlanta man accused of paying minors for explicit photos
news.summary: A 60-year-old metro Atlanta man was arrested on Tuesday on three counts of first-degree sexual exploitation of a minor.

news.title: ‘Armed and dangerous’ man wanted after vandalism rampage at Henry County home
news.summary: Police are searching for Ernest Scott after they found extensive damage to a home on South Ola Street on Tuesday.

news.title: 2 women arrested after Atlanta air conditioning robbery
news.summary: Two women were arrested in Atlanta after police said they robbed a resident at gunpoint and stole copper wire from his air conditioning unit to sell for $44.

news.title: Suspect arrested in fatal shooting of 19-year-old woman, police say
news.summary: A homicide suspect was taken into custody in connection with a 19-year-old woman's shooting death earlier this month, according to Atlanta Police.

news.title: Supervisor at Conyers Real-Time Crime Center arrested for allegedly using Flock system to track partner's location
news.summary: The Conyers Police Department said the supervisor "made multiple inquiries into the vehicle driven by her domestic partner in order to ascertain his location."

news.title: Man on Atlanta’s Top 10 Most Wanted list caught nearly 5 years after deadly shooting
Atlanta police arrest suspect after fatal June apartment shooting
news.summary: Police arrested 26-year-old Aloni Evans Wednesday morning in connection with a fatal June 14 shooting at an Atlanta apartment complex.

news.title: Man wanted after using rifle and SUV to batter Henry County home, police say
news.summary: Ernest Scott is wanted and considered armed and dangerous after he allegedly smashed the windows of a Henry County home with a rifle and then rammed the house with an SUV.

news.title: Homicide suspect arrested in death of 19-year-old woman
news.summary: Atlanta Police said on Thursday that 19-year-old Amari Haugabook was in custody and being interviewed by detectives.

news.title: Former accountant laundered $5.3 million stolen from Children’s Healthcare of Atlanta
news.summary: A 66-year-old former Certified Public Accountant from Atlanta was sentenced yesterday to years in federal prison.

news.title: Conyers police supervisor arrested for tracking partner with tech
news.summary: A supervisor at the Conyers Police Real-Time Crime Center was arrested after an internal audit revealed she allegedly used the city's license plate tracking system to monitor her domestic partner.

news.title: Gunfire in Stockbridge leaves 14-year-old dead and 12-year-old girl injured
news.summary: A 14-year-old boy was killed, and a 12-year-old girl was hospitalized after a shooting Wednesday afternoon in Stockbridge, according to police.

news.title: Blood trail leads to suspect in MARTA bus shooting
news.summary: A man and a woman were hospitalized Wednesday night after an accidental gun discharge aboard a MARTA bus near Roswell Road and Glenridge Road in Sandy Springs, according to police.

news.title: 2 rushed to hospital after gun discharged on MARTA bus in Sandy Springs, police say
news.summary: This is also believed to be the first shooting on MARTA transportation since before the World Cup began.

news.title: Doraville Police: Suspect called 911 to say she shot someone
news.summary: Officers arrived at the scene and located who they said was the shooter. She was taken into custody.

news.title: Suspect on Atlanta's 'Top 10 Most Wanted Fugitives' list arrested in connection with 2021 deadly shooting
news.summary: The Atlanta Police Department said 24-year-old Darius Williams was taken into custody in on July 21

news.title: Gwinnett County traffic stop leads to arrest over licensing dispute
news.summary: Gwinnett County police arrested a driver on Loganville Highway near Hope Hollow Road on June 25 after an officer noticed his license plate did not match.

news.title: Bloody late-night knock on neighbor's door leads to Paulding arrest
news.summary: A 62-year-old U.S. Army veteran is in the ICU with brain bleeding after a severe beating at a Paulding County home.

news.title: 14-year-old boy killed, 12-year-old girl injured in shooting in Stockbridge subdivision: police
news.summary: A 14-year-old boy was also found with a gunshot wound and "showed no signs of life" when officers arrived, police said.

news.title: Video shows moment Conyers Police use PIT maneuver to end high-speed chase
news.summary: When officers tried to make a stop, the driver sped off, prompting a chase that went into DeKalb County.

news.title: Atlanta police capture Top 10 Most Wanted murder suspect Darius Williams
news.summary: Atlanta police arrested Most Wanted murder suspect Darius Williams in Athens-Clarke County on Tuesday following a 2021 fatal shooting.

news.title: Georgia film tax fraud: Southwest Georgia men guilty in $550K scheme
news.summary: Two Tifton men face decades in prison after pleading guilty in a Southwest Georgia film tax fraud scheme involving $550,000 in fake refunds.

news.title: Hampton drive-by shooting: Police search for Deodar Lane suspects
news.summary: Henry County police are investigating a Hampton drive-by shooting after a home was hit by gunfire Wednesday morning.

news.title: 4 people shot in Atlanta's Bankhead neighborhood, police say
news.summary: This is a developing story.
